data.description:
OSCER's template-infra baseline is behind upstream. Surfaced 2026-06-25.

## Current state (Copier `_commit` markers)
- `.template-infra/base.yml`: **v0.17.0** (+1) → latest **v0.19.0** (behind v0.18.0, v0.19.0)
- `.template-infra/app-reporting-app.yml`: **v0.15.7** (+1) → latest **v0.19.0** (behind v0.16.0–v0.19.0)
- `.template-application-rails/reporting-app.yml`: **v1.0.0** (+3) → latest **v1.0.0** = UP TO DATE, nothing to pull.

The base layer (v0.17.0) and the reporting-app app layer (v0.15.7) have drifted apart, suggesting a prior partial/manual update. A clean `nava-platform infra update` would reconcile both.

## What's in the gap
- **v0.19.0** (latest; no hard migration, but E2E/infra-test-heavy projects may need minor migration): maintenance + security — Node 24 Actions runtime, Playwright v1.60, TypeScript v6, Terratest/Go bumps, batch of CVE fixes. Overlaps queued Dependabot bumps (#704/#707/#708 Playwright/axe). **Primary reason to pull.**
- **v0.18.0** (no migration): Document Data Extraction (DDE) module refinements + `file_upload_jobs` in PR envs (relevant to DocAI).
- **v0.17.0** ⚠️ migration: S3 Terraform state-locking, DDE module, SMS notifications. Base is already at v0.17.0 and the repo already has `bin/migrate-terraform-state-locking-to-s3` + `infra/modules/notifications-sms/`, so base-layer parts are likely already applied; app-layer pickup lags.
- **v0.16.0** ⚠️ migration: Pinpoint → SES for email. OSCER already mails via `:ses_v2`, so probably a no-op for OSCER; marker just doesn't reflect it.

## Caveat (important)
The Copier `_commit` markers are a LOWER BOUND, not ground truth: OSCER already has v0.16.0 (SES) and v0.17.0 (SMS module, S3 state-locking script) artifacts in-tree despite the app-layer marker reading v0.15.7. So the real delta is almost certainly smaller than "4 releases behind." Only a `nava-platform infra update` dry-run reveals the true diff. Do not size the work off the version gap.

## Suggested approach
- Dedicated `nava-platform infra update` PR (infra owner), review the Copier merge diff, resolve conflicts against OSCER's infra customizations, handle the v0.19.0 E2E/infra-test migrations. Separate from app-feature work. template-application-rails needs no action.

## Refs
- template-infra releases: https://github.com/navapbc/template-infra/releases (v0.19.0 2026-06-17, v0.18.0 2026-05-26, v0.17.0, v0.16.0 ⚠️)
- template-application-rails: https://github.com/navapbc/template-application-rails/releases (v1.0.0 latest)
data.title: Pull template-infra updates (v0.17.0/v0.15.7 -> v0.19.0) and reconcile base/app skew
